_readme: Registered compute backends. Every backend is a FULL ComfyUI instance
(Docker container / gateway) speaking the standard ComfyUI HTTP API.
type: comfyui_native (AKS Docker, RunPod, vast.ai, LAN box).
api_key_env: name of the env var holding the gateway bearer token ('' = none).
compute_profiles: which gateway routing profiles this backend accepts.
url_loader_map: optional rewrite of local loader nodes to a URL-capable
loader class installed on the backend image, e.g.
If empty, the courier substitutes the media path string with the cloud URL
in place (the backend image must patch its loaders to accept URLs).

backends.name: local-selftest
backends._note: Loops back to THIS ComfyUI — smoke-testing the farm plumbing only. Always use wait_for_completion=false with it (a blocking self-submit waits behind itself in the single local queue).

heavy_94gb.description: Node Pool A — 1 replica per 94GB GPU. 300-frame LTX, Wan 2.2 multi-pass.

light_30gb.description: Node Pool B — 3 replicas per GPU (~30GB each). SDXL stills, light video.
